meta.description: A guided exercise to discover, rank, and reflect on your ten most important personal values.

landing.title: What matters most to you?
landing.body: Work through {count} values in a series of simple choices and surface the ten that matter most — then reflect on how fully you're living them. Your progress is saved as you go, so you can pause anytime and pick up where you left off.

intro.title: Discover what matters most to you
intro.subtitle: This short exercise helps you surface — and rank — your ten most important personal values through a series of simple choices.
intro.step1Body: You'll see small sets of values drawn from a library of {count}. Each round, pick the one that matters Most to you and the one that matters Least.
intro.step2Body: Every value here is a good one — this is about what matters most to you right now, not what's “correct.” Go with your gut; the first you pick becomes your Most.
intro.step3Body: Any value can be reworded to fit your voice at any point — just tap the pencil icon on a card. Your wording carries through to your results.
intro.step4Body: Every choice is saved as you go, so you can stop anytime and pick up right where you left off — on any device. It takes about 15–20 minutes.
intro.inProgressNote: You're part way through — pick up where you left off.

auth.strengthHint: use 12+ characters with a mix of letters, numbers, and symbols.
auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue your values exercise. If you used the previous version of this site, your account still works — you may just need to sign in again.
auth.signupSubtitle: Your progress is saved continuously, so you can pause anytime and pick up where you left off — on any device.
auth.resetNotice: Your password has been reset. Sign in with your new password.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter the email you signed up with and we'll send you a link to choose a new password.
auth.forgotSent: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a link to reset your password. Check your inbox.
auth.resetInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one to try again.
auth.resetSubtitle: Enter a new password for your account.
auth.errorPasswordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.errorAccountExists: An account with this email already exists
auth.errorSomethingWrong: Something went wrong creating your account
auth.errorResetExpired: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.

assessment.prompt: Choose the value that matters <most>Most</most> and <least>Least</least> to you.
assessment.editHintPrefix: You can edit any value or definition anytime — just tap the
assessment.editingPast: You answered this round before — change it if it no longer feels right.
assessment.milestone25: A quarter of the way — you're building a clear picture.
assessment.milestone50: Halfway there. Take a breath — you're doing well.
assessment.milestone75: Three quarters done. Your top values are taking shape.
assessment.discoveryComplete: Discovery complete — these final rounds rank your top 25 values.
assessment.editValueTitle: Edit this value or its definition
assessment.editDialogDescription: Reword the name or definition so it speaks in your own voice. Your wording is used everywhere this value appears.
assessment.somethingWrong: Something went wrong — please try again.
assessment.couldNotSave: Could not save — please try again.
assessment.invalidationBody: That change reshuffled which values made your top 25, so the final ranking rounds have been reset — you'll redo just those {count} quick rounds. Everything else is saved.

results.title: Your ten most important values
results.body: Out of {total} rounds of choices, these are the values that rose to the top. Next you can fine-tune their wording, then reflect on how fully you're living each one.

customize.title: Make them yours
customize.subtitle: Reword any of your ten values so they speak in your own voice — or leave them exactly as they are.

rate.title: How fully are you living each value?
rate.subtitle: For each of your ten values, rate how completely it shows up in your life today — 1 means not at all, 10 means fully. There are no wrong answers; this is a snapshot to reflect on.

profile.title: Your values
profile.completedCount: {count, plural, one {# completed exercise} other {# completed exercises}}
profile.reassessRetakeHint: Reassess keeps your ten values and re-rates them as a new snapshot; Retake starts the whole exercise over.
profile.inProgressBanner: You have an exercise in progress.
profile.retakeDialogBodyActive: This discards your in-progress answers and starts a fresh exercise. Your completed results are kept.
profile.retakeDialogBodyIdle: This starts a fresh exercise from the beginning. Your completed results are kept.
profile.exportError: Could not export the image — please try again.
profile.emptyBodyActive: You have an exercise in progress — pick up right where you left off.
profile.emptyBodyIdle: You haven't completed the values exercise yet.
profile.savedToast: Your values are saved. Come back anytime to reflect or reassess.
profile.unchangedToast: No changes to save — your latest snapshot is unchanged.

reassess.title: Reassess your values
reassess.subtitle: Revisit your ten values: adjust their wording if your understanding has shifted, and re-rate how fully you're living each one today. This saves a new snapshot — your earlier results stay in your history.
reassess.livingLabel: How fully are you living it?
reassess.discardBody: You have unsaved edits. Leaving now will discard them — your earlier snapshots stay in your history.

consent.title: Authorize access
consent.body: This application isn't set up to request your consent yet. If you reached this page unexpectedly, please return to the app you came from.

1.name: ACCEPTANCE
1.description: to be accepted as I am

2.name: ACCURACY
2.description: to be accurate in my opinions and beliefs

4.name: ADVENTURE
4.description: to have new and exciting experiences

6.name: AUTHORITY
6.description: to be in charge of and responsible for others

10.name: CHALLENGE
10.description: to take on difficult tasks and problems

11.name: CHANGE
11.description: to have a life full of change and variety

12.name: COMFORT
12.description: to have a pleasant and comfortable life

14.name: COMPASSION
14.description: to feel and act on concern for others

15.name: CONTRIBUTION
15.description: to make a lasting contribution in the world

17.name: COURTESY
17.description: to be considerate and polite toward others

18.name: CREATIVITY
18.description: to have new and original ideas

20.name: DUTY
20.description: to carry out my duties and obligations

21.name: ECOLOGY
21.description: to live in harmony with the environment

22.name: EXCITEMENT
22.description: to have a life full of thrills and stimulation

23.name: FAITHFULNESS
23.description: to be loyal and true in relationships

25.name: FAMILY
25.description: to have a happy, loving family

26.name: FITNESS
26.description: to be physically fit and strong

27.name: FLEXIBILITY
27.description: to adjust to new circumstances easily

31.name: GENEROSITY
31.description: to give what I have to others

32.name: GENUINENESS
32.description: to act in a manner that is true to who I am

33.name: GOD'S WILL
33.description: to seek and obey the will of God

35.name: HEALTH
35.description: to be physically well and healthy

38.name: HOPE
38.description: to maintain a positive and optimistic outlook

40.name: HUMOR
40.description: to see the humorous side of myself and the world

41.name: INDEPENDENCE
41.description: to be free from dependence on others

42.name: INDUSTRY
42.description: to work hard and well at my life tasks

44.name: INTIMACY
44.description: to share my innermost experiences with others

45.name: JUSTICE
45.description: to promote fair and equal treatment for all

46.name: KNOWLEDGE
46.description: to learn and contribute valuable knowledge

47.name: LEISURE
47.description: to take time to relax and enjoy

48.name: LOVED
48.description: to be loved by those close to me

50.name: MASTERY
50.description: to be competent in my everyday activities

51.name: MINDFULNESS
51.description: to live conscious and mindful of the present moment

52.name: MODERATION
52.description: to avoid excesses and find a middle ground

53.name: MONOGAMY
53.description: to have one close, loving relationship

54.name: NON-CONFORMITY
54.description: to question and challenge authority and norms

55.name: NURTURANCE
55.description: to take care of and nurture others

56.name: OPENNESS
56.description: to be open to new experiences, ideas, and options

57.name: ORDER
57.description: to have a life that is well-ordered and organized

58.name: PASSION
58.description: to have deep feelings about ideas, activities, or people

60.name: POPULARITY
60.description: to be well-liked by many people

62.name: PURPOSE
62.description: to have meaning and direction in my life

63.name: RATIONALITY
63.description: to be guided by reason and logic

64.name: REALISM
64.description: to see and act realistically and practically

65.name: RESPONSIBILITY
65.description: to make and carry out responsible decisions

67.name: ROMANCE
67.description: to have intense, exciting love in my life

68.name: SELF-ACCEPTANCE
68.description: to accept myself as I am

70.name: SELF-CONTROL
70.description: to be disciplined in my own actions

72.name: SELF-KNOWLEDGE
72.description: to have a deep and honest understanding of myself

73.name: SERVICE
73.description: to be of service to others

74.name: SEXUALITY
74.description: to have an active and satisfying sex life

75.name: SIMPLICITY
75.description: to live life simply, with minimal needs

76.name: SOLITUDE
76.description: to have time and space where I can be apart from others

78.name: STABILITY
78.description: to have a life that stays fairly consistent

79.name: TOLERANCE
79.description: to accept and respect those who differ from me

80.name: TRADITION
80.description: to follow respected patterns of the past

81.name: VIRTUE
81.description: to live a morally pure and excellent life

83.name: WORLD PEACE
83.description: to work to promote peace in the world

84.name: PRESENCE
84.description: to be fully engaged in the current moment

85.name: EMOTIONAL INTELLIGENCE
85.description: to understand and work skillfully with my emotions

86.name: CATALYST
86.description: to initiate positive change in systems and communities

87.name: INTEGRITY
87.description: to align my actions with my deepest values

88.name: TRANSMISSION
88.description: to share my spiritual experience to benefit others

89.name: VULNERABILITY
89.description: to be open about my true feelings and experiences

90.name: IMPACT
90.description: to create lasting positive change in the world

91.name: EQUANIMITY
91.description: to maintain balance amid life's ups and downs

92.name: COMMUNITY
92.description: to be part of a supportive growth-oriented group

93.name: AUTHENTICITY
93.description: to live in alignment with my true nature
